command:
echo '' | base64 -d > /tmp/exec_detail.py && python3 /tmp/exec_detail.py 2>&1

echo '=== GMAIL BRIDGE ON vm-memory ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 '
echo "=== BRIDGE SOURCE (head 100 lines) ==="
head -100 /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge 2>/dev/null || echo NOT_FOUND
echo "=== SQLITE DB ==="
ls -la /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/bridge.sqlite3 2>/dev/null
echo "=== CAPABILITIES RESULT ==="
cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/results/chatgpt-20260625-capabilities-002.json 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "=== AUDIT LOG ==="
cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-gmail-bridge/audit/2026-06-25.jsonl 2>/dev/null | tail -10
' 2>&1
echo DONE_1990
